text.title: AWS Three-Tier Architecture (VPC, ALB, App, Database) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: plan-cidrs
step.action: Lay out /16 → /22 per AZ per tier.

step.name: deploy-vpc-subnets
step.action: Apply terraform-aws-modules/vpc with public/private/database subnets + NAT per AZ in prod.

step.name: deploy-alb
step.action: Provision ALB in public subnets; HTTPS listener.

step.name: deploy-app
step.action: Fargate service OR EKS deployment in private subnets; target group registered.

step.name: deploy-db-and-sg-matrix
step.action: Aurora SLv2 in isolated DB subnets; SG matrix using SG-by-ID references; encryption on.
